{{Quote|Too many of our fellow officers have died at the Dark Lord's whim, all for making mistakes that anyone human could've understood. And any of us might be next, unless we stop Vader first!|General Biel|<ref name="Tarkin" />}}
'''[[General/Legends|General]] Biel''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] officer stationed aboard the [[Tarkin (superweapon)|''Tarkin'']] [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]] around [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. He became involved in a conspiracy with several fellow officers to kill [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] for his frequent executions of subordinates. However, the ''Tarkin'' was sabotaged and destroyed by a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] strike, killing the general and everyone else aboard the station.

==Biography==
Biel, a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], held the rank of [[General/Legends|general]] in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and was stationed aboard the [[Tarkin (superweapon)|''Tarkin'']] superweapon around [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. He was the highest ranking member of a group of disgruntled officers bent on killing [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] due to the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord's]] viciousness in dealing with his subordinates. The general suggested that since Vader was focused on confronting the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], the opportunity had arrived to [[Death/Legends|assassinate]] Vader. [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Nord (Imperial)|Nord]] agreed and attempted to kill Vader by opening an airlock near the Dark Lord when he was pursuing Skywalker (who infiltrated the station), but Darth Vader managed to survive. When Vader had engaged the Rebels in a space battle, Nord again attempted to kill him and the Rebels with the ''Tarkin''{{'s}} [[Superlaser/Legends|superlaser]], but the firing mechanism had been sabotaged by the Rebel saboteurs, causing the station to self-destruct killing all aboard, including Biel.<ref name="Tarkin" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|I'm afraid we don't have the luxury of choice with Vader's thoughts focused on his obsession with that Rebel warrior. This could be our only chance!|Biel to the other officers|<ref name="Tarkin" />}}
Disgusted by Vader's brutality towards his subordinates, the general became the member of a conspiracy to eliminate Darth Vader while he visited the ''Tarkin'' [[battle station]]. Biel appeared to be a middle-aged [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] with greying hair and wore a standard [[Imperial officer's uniform/Legends|Imperial officer's uniform]].<ref name="Tarkin" />

==Behind the scenes==
Biel appeared in the fifty-second issue of the [[Marvel Comics|Marvel]] [[Star Wars (1977)|''Star Wars'']] comic series, [[Star Wars (1977) 52|''To Take The Tarkin'']].<ref name="Tarkin" />
